title: Solv - Rekt
relevance_summary: Self-reentrancy attack exploiting an unaudited contract on Solv Protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls a contract with known reentrancy vulnerabilities.

red_flags: Limited exploit affecting fewer than 10 users
summary: A self-reentrancy attack exploited an unaudited contract on Solv Protocol, resulting in the minting of 567 million tokens worth $2.73 million. A guard could have detected and blocked the transaction by monitoring for known reentrancy patterns.
